example_cases.description: Feature mode worktree branches from existing code (HEAD), not empty branch
example_cases.input: mode=feature, existing git repo with commits
example_cases.expected_output: Worktree created from HEAD, contains existing source files
example_cases.setup: Git repo with existing commits and source code

example_cases.description: Profile write triggers after successful greenfield build
example_cases.expected_output: .nopilot/profile/ contains l0-infra.json, l1-arch.json, l3-status.json (and l2 if enabled)
example_cases.setup: Complete greenfield discover + spec + build artifacts

example_cases.description: Profile write triggers after successful feature build
example_cases.expected_output: Profile updated with feature's incremental content

example_cases.description: Feature mode build artifacts written to feature directory
Greenfield mode build unchanged except profile write addition
example_cases.expected_output: All existing build behavior identical. Only addition: profile write at end. Artifacts at specs/ (not specs/features/).

example_cases.description: Profile write does not modify specs/ artifacts
example_cases.expected_output: specs/ directory content hash identical before and after profile write
example_cases.setup: Take snapshot of specs/ before build completion

property_cases.property: In greenfield mode, the only difference from pre-brownfield build behavior is the profile write step at the end — no other stage behavior changes
Profile write operation never creates, modifies, or deletes any file under specs/
